globalRules: Do not ingest the PDF notes literally. Use the reviewed canonical forms in this package as source of truth.
Do not invent new Russian vocabulary beyond the reviewed canonicalized content here, except unavoidable glue words already present in the notes for sentence reconstruction.
Do not mix the adult/profanity pack into any default review mode.
Do not mix perfective-future reference verbs into present-tense 2nd-conjugation drills.
Pronunciation notes are helper/reference only and should not be scored as hard right/wrong grammar items.

corrections.source: Page labels 'писать, играть, говорить, любить, помнить, слышать - 1st conjugation'
corrections.canonical: писать, играть -> 1st conjugation; говорить, любить, помнить, слышать -> 2nd conjugation
люблю, любишь, любит, любим, любите, любят
corrections.reason: completed from standard paradigm and note intent

corrections.source: A fragment missing subject: 'А обычно слышает твой голос.'
corrections.reason: subject restored so the sentence can be drilled

corrections.source: Some adjective example sentences contain agreement mistakes
corrections.canonical: Default decks keep the vocabulary but exclude the flawed source sentence or silently correct only when the correction is obvious and uses no extra vocabulary.

excludedOrDeferred.entry: The exact sentence 'Обычно он объяснит правило очень понятно.'
excludedOrDeferred.reason: perfective future clashes with usually/adverb of habit

excludedOrDeferred.entry: Pronunciation rules 'unstressed о -> а', 'unstressed е -> и', 'ться = ца'
excludedOrDeferred.reason: helpful rough guide, but too fuzzy to score as strict right/wrong text atoms
user notes include it, but it should be excluded from default paths and mixed review

excludedOrDeferred.entry: Raw malformed English-side example translations in adjective pages
excludedOrDeferred.reason: several English prompt lines and Russian examples mismatch; use the canonicalized phrases in this package instead
